title: Multiple Locations Per Location Column
excerpt: I would love to see the ability to add multiple locations to the location column per item. We track our digital campaigns, and the same ad will be promoted in 2-10 different US states. I’d rather not have to create 10 co…

posts.author: sunderwood4 (Elizabeth)
posts.cookedHtml: I would love to see the ability to add multiple locations to the location column per item. We track our digital campaigns, and the same ad will be promoted in 2-10 different US states. I’d rather not have to create 10 columns for one item, but I’d like to be able to see on a map where our message is being promoted.

posts.author: KL22 (KL)
posts.cookedHtml: I would also like to have this feature added. I’m tracking a database of online tools and want to track which states/countries have coverage. It would be very beneficial to list multiple locations per item.

posts.author: OliviaCrellin_Work (Olivia Crellin)
posts.cookedHtml: Work for a large non-profit and we also want to be able to log location where a programme is being carried out. The same programme will often be rolled out in multiple countries so multiple locations in the same column would be useful. Please add!

posts.author: popjaco (Poppy)
posts.cookedHtml: We also want to select multiple countries where our fund works - this is a must have feature!
